essay.manualGradingAlert: Essay questions require manual grading. Provide a scoring guide and rubric to assist graders.
essay.scoringGuidePlaceholder: Describe how to score this essay question. Include criteria for full credit, partial credit, etc.
essay.tip: Tip: Include specific criteria such as thesis quality, evidence use, organization, and grammar.

fillBlank.title: Fill in the Blanks
fillBlank.description: Use the "Add Blank" button in the editor to insert blanks into your question text. Configure correct answers below.

matching.title: Matching Pairs
matching.description: Create pairs of items that students will match. Left items are matched to right items.

readingComprehension.title: Reading Comprehension
readingComprehension.description: Enter the reading passage in the Question Content editor above. Add child questions below.
readingComprehension.noChildQuestions: No child questions yet. Click below to add one.

shortAnswer.title: Short Answer Configuration
shortAnswer.caseSensitiveHelper: When enabled, student answers must match the expected answer exactly including capitalization.
